summary: A Fox News Channel broadcast clip with 'FOX NEWS ALERT' and LIVE banners, news graphics about the Broadview, IL mayor declaring a civil emergency, and a studio interview with ICE Director Todd Lyons over aerial footage of protests outside an ICE facility. Lower-third reads 'ICE agents face 1000% spike in assaults.' This is a recorded TV news segment, not an agency-produced music-driven video, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: BROADVIEW MAYOR DECLARES CIVIL EMERGENCY; RPT: I.C.E. AGENTS FACE 1000% SPIKE IN ASSAULTS; FOX NEWS ALERT; TODD LYONS I.C.E. DIRECTOR
